tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests use a mix of AST parsing and actual code execution via subprocess. test_release_features_clears_all executes the extracted method with mock objects and verifies behavior. test_close_releases_session_mm_features executes the _close method with mocks. test_bos_offset_clamping evaluates the expression with test data. test_callers_use_release_features does AST inspection but checks for method calls. test_not_tautological.reason: test_release_features_clears_all requires a method that actually sets feature=None on items - a stub returning None would fail. test_close_releases_session_mm_features requires _close to actually call release_features and set multimodal_inputs=None. test_bos_offset_clamping requires offset expressions that clamp to non-negative values. test_callers_use_release_features requires actual .release_features() calls in the source. None of these pass with trivial stubs.
